---
title: "Song Popularity Machine Learning Final Project"
description: "One-line summary that appears on the project card."
date: "2026-01-15"
categories: [machine-learning, regression]
image: ../images/project-thumb.png
image-alt: "Thumbnail for this project"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
---

## Overview

A short paragraph describing the problem, approach, and outcome.

## Links

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/rqhq/REPO)

## Tech stack

R / tidyverse / glmnet /randomForest / gbm

## Report

<iframe src="../pdfs/Song Popularity Final Project.pdf" width="100%" height="650px" style="border: 1px solid #ccc;"></iframe>

[Download PDF](../pdfs/Song%20Popularity%20Final%20Project.pdf)

<!-- ## Notebook

  No notebook for this project — original work was done in R Markdown
  and is fully captured in the embedded PDF above. Delete this whole
  block, or uncomment and point at a real .ipynb if you add one later.

  {{< embed ../notebooks/PROJECT_NOTEBOOK.ipynb echo=true >}}
-->

## Results

Key findings, plots, takeaways.
